title: PVP Indicators
description: outlines players with comparison between enemy health to your own.
body:
PVP Indicators is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that adds outline highlights to nearby players based on how their health compares to yours.

Players are outlined with different colors when they have:
- more health than you
- the same health as you
- less health than you

Features:
- Health-based player outlines
- Separate colors for higher, equal, and lower health
- Mod Menu configuration support
- Toggle highlights in-game with a keybind
- Client-side only

Configuration:
Use Mod Menu’s Configure button to customize the outline colors for:
- higher health
- equal health
- lower health

Color values use hex format:
- RRGGBB
- AARRGGBB

Default keybind:
- H to toggle highlights

Compatibility:
- Fabric
- Client-side only
